## What changed

Describe the bounded change.

## Why

Describe the user, learning, or operational outcome.

## Validation

- [ ] Documentation and examples are accurate
- [ ] No private data, secrets, or deployment identity were added
- [ ] Relevant checks were run or the change is documentation-only
- [ ] A decision record was added or updated when a settled direction changed

## Notes

Call out data rights, resource limits, failure behavior, or follow-up work.
